events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: undersized motor overloads violate NEC 430.32 (overloads must be sized from nameplate FLA at 115%/125%, not generic HP tables). Since work is only staged, this fails inspection now — reject the mis-sized heaters/relays and recalculate before installation, since undersized units invite nuisance tripping and field bypassing that would eliminate motor protection entirely. Non-dependent tasks (conduit, disconnect mounting, conductor pulling) can still proceed.
